holdings.infoBox: SMLV is an equity ETF with a total of 404 individual holdings.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR US Small Cap Low Volatility Index ETF (SMLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap stocks selected and weighted by low volatility and other factors. SMLV was launched on Feb 20, 2013 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: State Street US Large Cap Low Volatility Index
